rows.description: * The Incumb. Domus (Lowe Bursar) ought to have been £24-13-11d. as of Lego 18.5 but was allowed to him to pay for furniture — in three years. Total £165.9.6 for £1293.15.6 and others occupied for a very short time by Fellows. So that £1000 is to remain for the purchase of New House, and a further sum to be applied for an Installation, or to the general account.
rows.notes: Complex, multi-line explanatory text for a final total entry. Several embedded amounts within the description. The extent and specific wording of the description are challenging to transcribe perfectly due to its length and small handwritten characters. An interlined '6' above 'Domus' is present but not explicitly included to maintain flow. The final large amount '3614 1' is clear, but the pence column appears intentionally blank. Small print at the very bottom of the page is considered an annotation/footnote to this entry and is not included as a separate ledger row.
